turns.text: Hi! Let's start easy. Have you used any AI tools in your work? Can you give an example?
Yes. I use ChatGPT to help me write code. I ask it questions and it gives me examples. I also use GitHub Copilot to write code faster.
Good. Do you know what an API is? Have you used an AI API?
Yes. An API is a way to use a service from my code. I have used the OpenAI API. You send a message and get an answer back. It is not very hard.
What is a prompt? Why is it important?
A prompt is the message you send to the AI. It is important because if you write a good prompt, you get a better answer. A bad prompt gives a bad answer.
Have you heard of tokens in the context of AI?
Yes, a little. Tokens are like small pieces of words. The AI reads and writes tokens. More tokens cost more money. So you want to use fewer tokens if possible.
Good. If an AI gives a wrong answer, what do you do?
I try to change my prompt. I add more information or I ask in a different way. Sometimes I tell the AI what was wrong and ask it to try again.
That makes sense. Do you have any questions for me?
Yes. What AI models does your team use? Do you use OpenAI, Google, or something else?
